user.title: Cable Modem Monitor
user.description: Select your modem's manufacturer, or choose 'All' to see every supported modem.

model.title: Select Modem
model.description: Choose your modem model. Models marked * are unverified.

data_description.model: Select your modem model from the list.
data_description.entity_prefix: Adds model name or IP to entity IDs. Required when monitoring multiple modems.

variant.title: Firmware Variant
variant.description: Your modem has multiple firmware variants with different authentication. Select the one that matches your setup.

data_description.host: Usually 192.168.100.1. Include http:// or https:// to skip protocol detection.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate
reauth_confirm.description: The modem rejected your credentials. Please re-enter them.

error.network_unreachable:
Cannot reach modem.

Check:
1. You're on the modem's network (not guest WiFi)
2. VPN is disconnected
3. IP address is correct (usually 192.168.100.1)
4. Modem web interface is accessible in your browser
error.cannot_connect:
Modem not responding.

Check:
1. IP address is correct
2. Try including the protocol (e.g., http://192.168.100.1)
3. Modem's web interface is accessible from Home Assistant's network
error.invalid_auth:
Login failed.

Check:
1. Username is correct (typically 'admin')
2. Password is correct (check modem label)
3. Try logging in via your browser first to verify credentials
error.parse_failed:
Connected but couldn't read modem data.

This may mean your modem needs a different variant selection. Try going back and selecting another option, or check that your modem's firmware is supported.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.missing_input: Required data is missing. Please restart the setup.
abort.unknown_model: Selected modem not found in catalog.

init.title: Cable Modem Settings
init.description: Update connection details and polling intervals.

data_description.entity_prefix: Adds model name or IP to entity IDs.
data_description.scan_interval: 30–86400 seconds. Default 600 (10 min). Set to 0 to disable automatic polling.
data_description.health_check_interval: 10–86400 seconds. Default 30. Set to 0 to disable health checks.

error.network_unreachable: Cannot reach modem. Check IP address and network connectivity.
error.cannot_connect: Modem not responding. Check IP address and protocol.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check username and password.
error.parse_failed: Connected but couldn't read modem data.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

generate_dashboard.name: Generate Dashboard
generate_dashboard.description: Generates ready-to-use Lovelace YAML for your cable modem dashboard. Copy the output and paste it into a Manual card.

include_status_card.name: Status Card
include_status_card.description: Modem status, uptime, channel counts, and restart button.

include_downstream_power.name: Downstream Power Graph
include_downstream_power.description: Power levels for all downstream channels.

include_downstream_snr.name: Downstream SNR Graph
include_downstream_snr.description: Signal-to-noise ratio for all downstream channels.

include_upstream_power.name: Upstream Power Graph
include_upstream_power.description: Power levels for all upstream channels.

include_errors.name: Error Graphs
include_errors.description: Corrected and uncorrected error counts (7-day view).

include_latency.name: Latency Graph
include_latency.description: Ping and HTTP response times (6-hour view).

graph_hours.name: Graph History (hours)
graph_hours.description: Hours of history for power/SNR graphs (errors and latency use fixed timeframes).

short_titles.name: Use Short Titles
short_titles.description: Short: 'DS Power (dBmV)' vs Long: 'Downstream Power Levels (dBmV)'.
